name: Multiple lawyers used Google AI Overview in my NY team—how to sue all?
description: Joint suit on firm; prove shared fault.[1]

mainEntity.name: Multiple lawyers used Google AI Overview in my NY team—how to sue all?

acceptedAnswer.text: Joint suit on firm; prove shared fault.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Sue jointly/severally if shared negligence caused harm; parse firm liability vs. individuals via partnership docs.[1] Factors: who filed fakes. Joinder simplifies. Settle firm-wide often.
